title: carduus crispus var. multiflorus
intro: Carduus crispus var. multiflorus, also known as the multiflorous plumeless thistle, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, fever, and skin conditions, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. The herbal preparations of Carduus crispus var. multiflorus include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its health benefits.
